acquisition method: MS data were acquired using a data-dependent top10 method dynamically choosing the most abundant precursor ions from the survey scan.
instrument: coupled to Thermo Fisher-QExactive equipped with nanoelectrospray ion source.
ionization type: coupled to Thermo Fisher-QExactive equipped with nanoelectrospray ion source.
labeling: the tooth protein extracts were subjected to label-free quantification using mass spectrometry.
